Astrophytum pullispinum is further classified within the subfamily Cactoideae, a large subfamily that encompasses many species of cacti. The genus Astrophytum is a group of cacti that are known for their globular shape and are native to Mexico. Astrophytum pullispinum is a specific species within this genus and is native to the states of Chihuahua and Durango in Mexico.
